title: thymus mastichina var. carnosus
intro: Thymus mastichina var. carnosus, also known as Spanish thyme, is a subspecies of the Thymus mastichina plant, a low-growing, evergreen shrub native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Thymus mastichina var. carnosus include its ability to relieve respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to aid in digestion and reduce stress. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used in traditional medicine and as natural remedies for various ailments.
